ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1684. Composed the music for the departure of Podesta` of Padua Bernardo Memmo (Introduzione all`Academia de Ricourati dedicata a sue ecc.ze ... Bernardo Memmo, 1684). Appointed Bishop of Caorle in 1698, was never officially consacrated.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
